title: Month 1: Foundations & Target Lock

tracks.name: DSA Track
tracks.content: Arrays, strings, hashing, two pointers — 3–4 problems/day. Connect every problem to reality: LRU cache = Redis eviction. Consistent hashing = Uber matching pod routing. Bloom filter = Razorpay fraud pre-screen.

tracks.name: Systems Track
tracks.content: HTTP/HTTPS/DNS/TLS/TCP deep: run curl -v and dig +trace on every endpoint. REST vs gRPC vs webhooks vs SSE vs WebSocket. PostgreSQL fundamentals: ACID, isolation levels, indexes, EXPLAIN ANALYZE. Small designs: URL shortener, leaderboard, rate limiter, notification service. ADR/RFC habit from Day 1: every major decision → 3-paragraph doc.

tracks.name: Project Track
tracks.content: No project yet. All 5 repos created: Raw HTTP server shell (Go), README.md + BENCHMARKS.md placeholder, GitHub Actions, goleak.VerifyNone(t) in every test file.

deliverables: Categorise each into its work bucket
Weekly time-block locked in: DSA 5h + Systems 3h + Project 10h

tracks.name: DSA Track
tracks.content: Sliding window, two pointers, binary search, linked lists — 3 problems/day. Tag by pattern.

tracks.name: Systems Track
tracks.content: Kafka essentials: topic/partition/offset, consumer groups, exactly-once, Outbox pattern. All 4 PostgreSQL isolation levels with live anomaly demos. Design 'charge a card', 'retry a failed payment', 'webhook with retries + backoff'.

tracks.name: Project Track
tracks.content: PayRail v1: A payment gateway + UPI engine. Double-entry ledger, Idempotency, UPI flow, Webhook delivery, Outbox pattern. Kafka topic design. Benchmarks (k6): 10K TPS, p99 < 500ms.

tracks.name: DSA Track
tracks.content: Trees, graphs, BFS/DFS, heaps — 2–3 medium/hard per day. Speed + explanation clarity.

tracks.name: Systems Track
tracks.content: Reconciliation engine, Risk engine (3-layer fraud detection: Wasm → Go → ONNX), Saga pattern, Observability (structured logs, trace_id, RED metrics), Kafka CDC.

tracks.name: Project Track
tracks.content: PayRail v2: Reconciliation engine, Risk engine with < 200ms total latency, Payment Saga (compensating transactions). Behavioral story bank started.

tracks.name: DSA Track
tracks.content: DP fundamentals, greedy, intervals — 2–3 problems/day.

tracks.name: Systems Track
tracks.content: H3 hexagonal grid (resolution 7/9), PostGIS ST_DWithin + GIST index (800ms → 2ms), Consistent hashing, Cassandra write-heavy telemetry (1M events/day).

tracks.name: Project Track
tracks.content: DispatchOS v1: Real-time marketplace matching engine. Go location aggregator (520K events/sec), Matching engine every 500ms (< 50ms for 10K requests), Trip assignment Saga.

tracks.name: DSA Track
tracks.content: Bit manipulation, tries, union-find — 2 problems/day. Timed mock sets (45-min blocks).

tracks.name: Systems Track
tracks.content: Multi-tenant SaaS patterns (RLS, schema-per-tenant, X-Tenant-ID), RBAC + ABAC, K8s Operator (CRD pattern), Multi-tenant SaaS design.

tracks.name: Project Track
tracks.content: DispatchOS v2: Surge pricing (ONNX Go inference), K8s Operator for matcher pool scaling, GPS fraud detection. WorkOS v1: Multi-tenant HRIS (PostgreSQL RLS), RBAC middleware, Employee onboarding Saga.

tracks.name: DSA Track
tracks.content: Graph algorithms (Dijkstra, Bellman-Ford), topological sort, advanced DP — 2 problems/day.

tracks.name: Systems Track
tracks.content: K8s Operator deep: WorkOSTenantProvisioner (Provisions PSQL, Redis, S3, Kafka in 30s), Delta Lake (ACID, time-travel), Data lineage Dag, Live sports score service design.

tracks.name: Project Track
tracks.content: WorkOS v2: Audit log (tamper-evident), Usage-based billing. FoundryOS v1: CDC auto-ingestion, PySpark pipeline (Kafka → Delta Lake), Lineage tracking. 3x/week mocks.

tracks.name: DSA Track
tracks.content: Hard problems only — 1–2/day. Tag weak areas, review systematically.

tracks.name: Systems Track
tracks.content: HLS internals (manifests, segments, ABR), WebRTC (WHIP, < 500ms latency), Spark Structured Streaming, Human-in-the-loop AI (approval queues).

tracks.name: Project Track
tracks.content: FoundryOS v2: Human-in-the-loop AI (Palantir AIP architecture), Great Expectations data gating. StreamEdge v1: HLS origin server (Go + Transcoding), Live score overlay (WS + Redis fan-out), CDN pre-warming.

title: Month 8: StreamEdge v2 + Interview simulation Sprint

tracks.name: DSA Track
tracks.content: 1–2 hard problems/day. Weak pattern focus only.

tracks.name: Systems Track
tracks.content: Company-specific designs: Rippling (Onboarding Saga), Palantir (Pipeline reliability/Lineage), Uber (H3 matching), DoorDash (Assignment/ETA), JioHotstar (Live streaming), Razorpay (Payments/Fraud), Databricks (Columnar vs Row).

tracks.name: Project Track
tracks.content: StreamEdge v2: K8s Operator for viewer scaling, WebRTC WHIP ingest, TimescaleDB telemetry. Projects polish: BENCHMARKS.md, Architecture diagrams, ADRs, Deployed demos.

tracks.name: DSA Track
tracks.content: 1 problem/day. Maintenance only.

tracks.name: Systems Track
tracks.content: Revise only. No new material.

tracks.name: Deliverables
tracks.content: Apply via referral > portal. 5–10 real conversations with engineers. Per-company prep card. Resume v2. Prepped for high-bar backend roles.
